languages.text: {n}Эоганн осторожно приближается к Триасомате.{/n} "Праведник, я вижу, тебе тяжко дается осознание себя в новом теле. Возможно, эта притча поможет..."
{n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн осторожно приближается к Триасомате.{/n} "Праведник, я вижу, тебе тяжко дается осознание себя в новом теле. Возможно, эта притча поможет..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."
{n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."
{n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはトライアスモータに近づいていく。{/n}「正義の三者、新しい体で自分を認識するのが難しいようですね。この比喩が役に立つかもしれません…」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."

traits.locale_text: エオグンはトライアスモータに近づいていく。「三位一体の聖なる者、新しい体で自分を認識するのが難しいようですね。この比喩が役に立つかもしれません…」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡试探着靠近三相体。{/n}“正义的三位一体者，看来你适应起这具躯体来有些困难。或许这则寓言能有所启发……”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡试探着靠近三相体。{/n}“正义的三位一体者，看来你适应起这具躯体来有些困难。或许这则寓言能有所启发……”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'approche du Triasomata d'un pas hésitant.{/n} « Vertueuse triade, je constate que vous avez du mal à vous reconnaître dans votre nouveau corps. Cette parabole vous aidera peut-être... »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn s'approche du Triasomata d'un pas hésitant.{/n} « Vertueuse triade, je constate que vous avez du mal à vous reconnaître dans votre nouveau corps. Cette parabole vous aidera peut-être... »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se acerca tentativamente al triasómata.{/n} «Virtuoso trino, veo que le resulta difícil reconocerse en su nuevo cuerpo. Puede que esta parábola le ayude...».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se acerca tentativamente al triasómata.{/n} «Virtuoso trino, veo que le resulta difícil reconocerse en su nuevo cuerpo. Puede que esta parábola le ayude...».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, çekinerek Üçyeköz'e yaklaşıyor.{/n} "Doğruluk Üçlüsü, görüyorum ki yeni bedeninde kendini tanımakta zorlanıyorsun. Belki bu meselin yardımı olur..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, çekinerek Üçyeköz'e yaklaşıyor.{/n} "Doğruluk Üçlüsü, görüyorum ki yeni bedeninde kendini tanımakta zorlanıyorsun. Belki bu meselin yardımı olur..."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nähert sich dem Triasomata vorsichtig.{/n} "Rechtschaffene Dreifaltigkeit, ich sehe, es fällt Euch schwer, Euch in Eurem neuen Körper wiederzuerkennen. Vielleicht wird Euch diese Parabel helfen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."
